title: T-063 — formulations + formulation_versions + formulation_ingredients + calc_cache + audit_log tables (NPD-g)
prompt:
# T-063 — Recipe formulation schema

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the 5 formulation tables (formulations, formulation_versions, formulation_ingredients, formulation_calc_cache, formulation_audit_log) per §17.11.1 DDL with RLS + state machine + cascade.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0063_formulations.sql per §17.11.1 DDL: formulations (UUID PK, project_id FK, product_code FK fa, current_version_id, locked_at, locked_by_user); formulation_versions (UUID PK, formulation_id ON DELETE CASCADE, version_number, state CHECK in draft/submitted_for_trial/locked, batch_size_kg, target_yield_pct, target_price_eur, UNIQUE(formulation_id, version_number)); formulation_ingredients (UUID PK, version_id ON DELETE CASCADE, rm_code, qty_kg, pct, cost_per_kg_eur, allergens_inherited TEXT[], sequence); formulation_calc_cache (cached cost/nutrition/allergen JSON keyed by version_id); formulation_audit_log (append-only).
2. ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + tenant_isolation policies on all 5 tables.
3. Drizzle schemas in packages/db/src/schema/formulations.ts (single file or 5 split — implementation choice); barrel update.
4. Indexes: (tenant_id, project_id) on formulations; (formulation_id, version_number) UNIQUE; (version_id, sequence) on ingredients.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0063_formulations.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/formulations.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/formulations.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0063 runs, when \d formulation_versions runs, then it lists state CHECK in (draft|submitted_for_trial|locked) and UNIQUE(formulation_id, version_number) per §17.11.1 DDL
2. Given a formulation_version is deleted, when DELETE runs, then matching formulation_ingredients rows are CASCADE-deleted (per ON DELETE CASCADE) and formulation_audit_log rows are retained
3. Given two tenants seeded, when tenant A SELECT * FROM formulation_ingredients runs, then it returns only tenant A rows (RLS verified through formulation_versions parent join)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/formulations.test.ts asserting state CHECK + UNIQUE + cascade + RLS before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test formulations'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow state values outside the CHECK enum
- Do not omit ON DELETE CASCADE on formulation_ingredients
- Do not skip RLS on any of the 5 tables

pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0063 emits all 5 tables. State machine enforced via CHECK. CASCADE on ingredients. Audit table append-only. Drizzle types exported.

Do not seed Reference.NutritionTargets (covered in T-069 territory)
